title: Personal Shrinking Device
description: Personal shrinking device(PSD) lets you shrink yourself! Or set default size for all players!
body:
# Adds "Personal Shrinking Device(PSD)" that lets you scale yourself to any size!

# Questions and Answers:
Q: Why plugin does not work on my server?\
A: Make sure you are using server with version 1.20.6 or higher(you can check that using /ver).

Q: My server is version X and plugin is version Y will it work?\
A: As long as server version is not lower than plugin version it should work, if not then let me know in Community server [https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD](https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD) and im gonna update it for you.

Q: How can I set default size for new players?\
A: Open your plugins folder > Go to Personal Shrinking Device Folder(If folder is not there you need to start server after installing plugin) > open Config.yml > set "default-player-size" to any value you want > and last just type "/psd reload" in chat bar.

Q: How does the plugin work?\
A: After installing plugin just type the /psd command into chat(make sure you are opped/have permision on the server, otherwise, command won't do anything). Then right click the air while having Personal Shrinking Device in your hand. And adjust the size using items in the gui.

Q: I need additional support, where do i get it?\
A: In our Community server [https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD](https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD).
